warnings: Generated 60K zero source is accepted for this baseline run but remains below dps+guard certificate preference.

formal_gaps.description: Exact transport of the RH predicate under the gauge is not proved, only witnessed.
formal_gaps.title: Exact transport of the RH predicate

formal_gaps.description: Whether tau is structurally singled out, or whether any c > 1 would serve. Not a proof obligation — a parked research question outside the critical path.
formal_gaps.title: Uniqueness of tau as the gauge base

formal_gaps.description: Heuristic argument that a rogue zero at ordinate ~10^9999 cannot hide under compression; no formal non-hiding theorem.
formal_gaps.title: No hiding under compression

formal_gaps.description: The contradiction-by-detectability route lacks a formal amplification theorem.
formal_gaps.title: Formal detectability theorem for the Contradiction Track

formal_gaps.description: The contradiction route lacks a formal closure artifact showing that detectability plus no-hiding plus a verified bounded view forces the intended contradiction.
formal_gaps.title: Contradiction closure proof

formal_gaps.description: The mapping of experiments to obligations (PROOF_PROGRAM_SPEC §7) is provisional. Sprint 3b.0 witness-map review must be signed off before API/schema contracts treat witness mappings as authoritative.
formal_gaps.title: Provisional witness map

program_2_contradiction_track.note: Program 2 is mixed and remains route-unresolved. This does not refute Program 1.

what_this_does_not_show: This does not prove RH and does not turn passing witnesses into proof.
what_this_shows: Current-run proxy witnesses and controls only; no stale certificate data is used.
